mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate exceeding 8.0 percent signals severe labor market slack and weak consumer demand, which forces corporate earnings downgrades and produces negative equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: S&P 500 produces positive 60-day returns in more than 60 percent of triggered instances despite the negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in retail sales and housing starts confirm broad-based consumer spending recovery, driving corporate revenue growth and positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The joint signal yields a negative Rank IC over a 3-year rolling window or fails to outperform a single-proxy baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the industrial production index indicates capacity utilization exhaustion and impending economic deceleration, triggering negative equity returns within one week.
failure_condition: Positive 5-day forward returns dominate in more than 55 percent of observations during late-cycle peaks.

mechanism_narrative: A consumer price index reading above 2.5 percent year-over-year triggers inflation fears and expectations of monetary tightening, compressing equity valuations and producing negative forward returns.
failure_condition: S&P 500 generates positive 20-day returns in more than 65 percent of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll employment growth outpacing the unemployment rate decline indicates robust labor market absorption and rising wage pressures, supporting corporate margins and positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The interaction term loses statistical significance and Rank IC falls below 0.02 in walk-forward validation.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly GDP growth falling below 1.5 percent signals economic stagnation and deteriorating corporate profit forecasts, leading to negative equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in more than 60 percent of triggered cases over a 5-year sample.

mechanism_narrative: Negative real interest rates, calculated as the federal funds rate minus the consumer price index, stimulate risk appetite and leverage-driven asset purchases, generating positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Negative real rates coincide with negative S&P 500 returns in more than 55 percent of observations.
